records.ety: [OF. eswarder to look at, consider, decide, judge; es (L. ex) + warder, garder, to observe, take heed, keep, fr. OHG. wartēn to watch, guard. See Ward.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Awarded; p. pr. & vb. n. Awarding.]

defs: To give by sentence or judicial determination; to assign or apportion, after careful regard to the nature of the case; to adjudge; as, the arbitrators awarded damages to the complainant.
quotes: To review The wrongful sentence, and award a new.

defs: To determine; to make an award.

records.ety: [Cf. OF. award, awart, esgart. See Award, v. t.]

defs: A judgment, sentence, or final decision. Specifically: The decision of arbitrators in a case submitted.
quotes: An award had been given against.

defs: The paper containing the decision of arbitrators; that which is warded.
